channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: High consumption of sugary drinks linked to higher liver cancer risk
item.description: Increased intake of sugar-sweetened beverages was associated with a higher risk of hepatocellular carcinoma and intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma, accord...

item.title: 11 natural ways to reduce cortisol levels
Does yogurt help prevent colon cancer?
Common walking mistakes and how to correct them
item.description: Walking is a nearly perfect, low-impact exercise, but improper shoes, pace, or routine can hinder progress and potentially cause injury.
